body:
## Problem
PvE matches were not being persisted to MongoDB. Every game end
triggered `ERROR: pve archiveGame rejected` with no detail.

Root cause: `Match.create` was passed `chosenElement: null` (the
default from `createPlayerState`). The Match schema defines
`chosenElement` as `String, enum: ['WATER','FIRE','GRASS']` — Mongoose
throws a ValidationError on an explicit `null` that is not in the enum.
## Fix
- Omit `chosenElement` from the create payload when it is `null`
  (`ctx.player.chosenElement != null ? { chosenElement: ... } : {}`)
- Wrap `Match.create`, `MatchReplay.create`, and
  `User.findByIdAndUpdate` in individual try/catch blocks that log
  `errMessage` + `mongooseFieldErrors` before re-throwing, so any
  future schema regression surfaces immediately
- Remove all temporary `pveArchiveDebug` instrumentation
- Simplify `logPveHandshakeAuthTrace` → `warnIfNoUserId` (only warn
  on failure; remove the noisy per-connection success INFO log)
## Verified
- `db.matches` documents written correctly after WIN
- `User.stats.totalGames` / `totalWins` / `maxDamage` / `winRate`
  all increment as expected

## 问题
PvE 对局结束后，比赛结果没有成功持久化到 MongoDB。每次游戏结束都会触发 ERROR: pve archiveGame rejected，但最初日志没有输出具体错误原因。
根本原因是：Match.create() 被传入了 chosenElement: null（默认来自 createPlayerState）。而 Match schema 中将 chosenElement 定义为：
String, enum: ['WATER', 'FIRE', 'GRASS']
由于 PvE 流程目前不会真正设置 chosenElement，Mongoose 会对显式传入的 null 抛出 ValidationError，导致整个 archive 流程提前失败。
---
## 修复内容
- 当 chosenElement 为 null 时，不再写入 Match.create() payload  
  （ctx.player.chosenElement != null ? { chosenElement: ... } : {}）
- 为以下持久化步骤分别增加独立 try/catch：
  - Match.create
  - MatchReplay.create
  - User.findByIdAndUpdate
  现在会在 re-throw 前输出：
  - errMessage
  - mongooseFieldErrors
  方便未来 schema 回归问题快速定位。
- 删除所有临时 pveArchiveDebug 调试日志
- 简化 logPveHandshakeAuthTrace → warnIfNoUserId
  （仅在失败时 warning，移除每次连接都会输出的冗余 INFO 日志）
---
## 验证结果
- db.matches 已在 PvE WIN 后正确写入文档
- User.stats.totalGames
- User.stats.totalWins
- User.stats.maxDamage
- User.stats.winRate
title: fix(pve): fix archiveGame ValidationError by omitting null chosenElement
